   Location: ./app/tests/test_audit_logging.py:335:4
334	
335	    def get_auth_token(
336	        self,
337	        client,
338	        username="admin",
339	        password="admin123",
340	    ):  # nosec B106
341	        """Helper method to get auth token."""
342	        response = client.post(
343	            "/api/v1/auth/login",
344	            json={"username": username, "password": password},
345	            headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
346	        )
347	
348	        # Extract token from response
349	        if response.status_code == 200:
350	            data = response.get_json()
351	            # Handle standardized response envelope
352	            if "data" in data:
353	                return data["data"]["access_token"]
354	            if "access_token" in data:
355	                return data["access_token"]
356	        return None
357

6	
7	    def get_auth_token(self, client, username="admin", password="admin123"):
8	        """Helper method to get auth token."""
9	        response = client.post(
10	            "/api/v1/auth/login",
11	            json={"username": username, "password": password},
12	        )
13	        if response.status_code == 200:
14	            # Response is wrapped in success envelope: {'success': True, 'data': {...}}
15	            return response.json["data"]["access_token"]
16	        return None
17

>> Issue: [B107:hardcoded_password_default] Possible hardcoded password: 'admin123'
   Severity: Low   Confidence: Medium
   CWE: CWE-259 (https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/259.html)
   More Info: https://bandit.readthedocs.io/en/1.9.4/plugins/b107_hardcoded_password_default.html
   Location: ./app/tests/test_integration.py:11:4
10	
11	    def get_auth_token(self, client, username="admin", password="admin123"):
12	        """Helper method to get auth token."""
13	        response = client.post(
14	            "/api/v1/auth/login",
15	            json={"username": username, "password": password},
16	            headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
17	        )
18	        if response.status_code == 200:
19	            data = json.loads(response.data)
20	            if "data" in data and "access_token" in data["data"]:
21	                return data["data"]["access_token"]
22	            raise KeyError(f"'access_token' not found in login response: {data}")
23	        raise RuntimeError(f"Login failed: {response.status_code} {response.data}")
24

7	    def get_auth_token(self, client, username="admin", password="admin123"):
8	        """Helper method to get authentication token."""

   Location: ./app/tests/test_user_permissions.py:88:4
87	
88	    def get_auth_token(self, client, username="admin", password="admin123"):
89	        """Helper method to get auth token."""
90	        response = client.post(
91	            "/api/v1/auth/login",
92	            json={"username": username, "password": password},
93	            headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
94	        )
95	
96	        if response.status_code == 200:
97	            data = json.loads(response.data)
98	            # Handle both wrapped and unwrapped responses
99	            if "data" in data and "access_token" in data["data"]:
100	                return data["data"]["access_token"]
101	            if "access_token" in data:
102	                return data["access_token"]
103	        return None
104

   Location: ./app/tests/test_utils.py:28:0
27	
28	def get_auth_token(client, username="admin", password="admin123"):
29	    """Helper method to get authentication token for testing.
30	
31	    Args:
32	        client: Flask test client
33	        username: Username for login (default: "admin")
34	        password: Password for login (default: "admin123")
35	
36	    Returns:
37	        str: JWT access token
38	
39	    Raises:
40	        AssertionError: If login fails
41	    """
42	    response = client.post(
43	        "/api/v1/auth/login",
44	        json={"username": username, "password": password},
45	        headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
46	    )
47	    assert response.status_code == 200
48	    data = unwrap_response(response)
49	    return data["access_token"]

   Severity: Low   Confidence: Medium

   Location: ./app/tests/test_validation_decorator.py:137:4
136	
137	    def get_auth_token(self, client, username="admin", password="admin123"):
138	        """Helper method to get auth token."""
139	        response = client.post(
140	            "/api/v1/auth/login",
141	            json={"username": username, "password": password},
142	            headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"},
143	        )
144	
145	        if response.status_code == 200:
146	            data = json.loads(response.data)
147	            # Handle wrapped response
148	            if "data" in data and "access_token" in data["data"]:
149	                return data["data"]["access_token"]
150	            if "access_token" in data:
151	                return data["access_token"]
152	        return None
153
